parsed_review.summary:
CP00-452 is a clean, descriptor-only closeout pack that closes the final RP14 "Partner Settlement" review/closeout slice (M09 Claude Review Packet tail = 13 rows, M10 Closeout And Next Handoff = 10 rows) over 23 RP14 units and hands off to RP15.P00.M00.S01. Read-only inspection (Read/Grep/Glob) confirms the pack-level claims are supported and no boundaries are violated.

Verified: (1) Scope/distribution reconcile to 23 units across registry SETTLEMENT_CORE_CP452_PACK_BINDING (registry.js:443), CP452_REQUIREMENTS (registry.js:2375), manifest, contract current_pack (settlement-core-contract.json:16), the plan entry (closeout-pack-plan.json:410), and the test/validator harness — deliverable split 16 implementation / 3 claude_review / 2 security_audit / 1 test / 1 ui and micro counts M09=13, M10=10 all match. (2) Descriptor-only enforcement: freezeCp452Result (service.js:3287) and freezeCp452Validation (validators.js:4689) stamp synthetic_only/no_real_data and set every settlement/origination/allocation/working-credit runtime, state-write, audit-write, permission-eval, Hermes-runtime-receipt, and command-runtime flag to false; a scoped scan for any such flag set true across the settlement package, the contract, and the CP452 docs returned no matches. (3) Authority boundary intact: authority_boundary.claude_is_final_approval=false, promotes_claude_to_final_approval=false, claims_enterprise_trust_from_local_validation=false, human_final_approval_required_for_runtime_opening=true — asserted in source, contract projection, tests (model.test.js:1815/1832), and the validator script (validate-rp14-settlement-core-contract.mjs:1475/1481). (4) Hermes patterns used only for the deterministic descriptor evidence packet (H14, emits_hermes_runtime_receipt=false), never product runtime; production_ready_candidate is gated on coverage+slice validity, not a runtime/trust claim. (5) CP178+ review-evidence hardening: readiness auth-preflight passed (exit 0, 1436-byte valid-JSON stdout, zero errors/warnings), validation-report confirms read-tools inspection mode, summary-only prohibited (Risk C + security/review deliverables), and no forbidden tools. (6) No overclaim: manifest production_ready=false / runtime_ready=false / status=implemented_pending_review; the three post-review artifacts (claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, construction-inspection.json) are correctly absent at this read_only_claude_run stage (CP00-451 confirms they are produced only after closeout), and closeout-pack:validate is correctly deferred as post-review-gated. (7) Continuity: predecessor CP00-451 is production_ready=true with next_subphase RP14.P09.M09.S08 (= CP452 first unit); CP452 closes RP14 and points to CP00-453/RP15.

Claude acted as an independent read-only reviewer only; final enterprise-trust approval remains a human responsibility outside this receipt. No P0/P1/P2/P3 findings. The review does not block pack closeout or goal closeout, and there are no unresolved P0 or P1 issues.
